title: Section Template Library CRUD
description: Implement full CRUD for section templates: API routes with flat JSON persistence, frontend components (list, detail with markdown rendering, form with markdown editor), API service, and seed data with realistic regulatory content.
designContext: Entity: Template with fields id, name, category (enum: risk-factors, management-discussion, financial-summary, legal-disclaimers, other), content (markdown string), createdAt. Use scaffoldEntity() for boilerplate. Markdown rendered client-side using marked library (served from node_modules or bundled). Template detail view must show rendered HTML from markdown content.
